name: playwright-e2e-framework
description: Full-stack demo application with a production-ready Playwright E2E automation framework.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client:assets: cp src/client/index.html dist/client/index.html && cp src/client/styles.css dist/client/styles.css
scripts.dev: npm run build:client && sh -c 'npm run dev:client:watch & npm run dev:server'
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:client
